name: bg-progress-light
prompt: a soft warm app background illustration, flat vector, gentle and non-distracting, low-contrast, soft gradients and faint paper texture, NO text, NO words, NO guitar fretboard lines. Keep the CENTER calm and mostly empty for app content. Wide landscape composition. Design language: large soft rounded translucent organic blobs forming gentle soft bands along the top edge and the bottom edge, with a calm center band between them. Warm palette: soft cream #FFF6EC center, blobs in teal #2DD4BF, coral and amber #FFB23E. Plus, tucked into the TOP-RIGHT corner among the edge blobs, a soft simple progress signifier: a few small ascending rounded bars like a mini bar chart with a gentle upward trend and a small star at the top, clearly suggesting stats and progress; a couple of soft sparkles near the other edges. Absolutely NO martial-arts belt and NO ribbon.
